title: Houlletia antioquensis
taxonomy: Houlletia antioquensis is classified as a species within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the genus Houlletia. Houlletia antioquensis is native to Colombia and is considered to be an endangered species. The classification of Houlletia antioquensis is further detailed within the subfamily Cymbidioideae. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Houlletia antioquensis from other related orchid species.

It has been used to treat various health issues, including fever and respiratory problems. intro: Houlletia antioquensis, also known as the "antioquensis orchid," is a flowering plant species belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Research has identified several health benefits associated with Houlletia antioquensis, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its potential use in treating various health conditions.
